step.title: Gather scope from user
step.action: Ask the user what they want to build. Clarify the goal, target audience, and any constraints.
Keep the conversation lightweight — this is a quick spec, not a full PRD.

step.title: Write lightweight spec
step.action: Draft a concise spec covering Goal, Scope, Acceptance Criteria, and Estimated Effort.
Keep each section to a few bullet points. Aim for 1-2 pages max.

step.title: Produce quick-spec
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill in all sections based on the user conversation.
